title: Snøhetta Design
summary: During my six-month internship at Snøhetta Design in Oslo, Norway, I contributed motion design, 3D and creative code to projects including Canada Goose, 113 Spring NYC, the Norwegian Opera House, Promenaden, Viabizzuno and Ege Carpets. The internship later developed into an ongoing collaboration.
